description: Base inicial local do Motor CVE do Sistema Magi. Nao e uma base completa de CVEs; e uma base de decisao para priorizar resposta.

critical.recommended_action: Aplicar patch urgente e validar exposicao do ativo.

high.recommended_action: Priorizar patch e revisar controles compensatorios.

medium.recommended_action: Planejar correcao e monitorar atividade relacionada.

low.recommended_action: Monitorar e corrigir em janela regular.

CVE-2021-44228.name: Log4Shell
CVE-2021-44228.recommended_action: Validar exposicao do servico Java/Log4j, restringir acesso externo e aplicar patch imediatamente.
CVE-2021-44228.decision_reason: CVE historicamente explorado de forma remota e com alto impacto.

CVE-2020-1472.name: Zerologon
CVE-2020-1472.recommended_action: Tratar controlador de dominio como ativo critico, validar patch e revisar logs de autenticacao/controlador.
CVE-2020-1472.decision_reason: Falha critica envolvendo controlador de dominio e risco de comprometimento de dominio.

CVE-2019-0708.name: BlueKeep
CVE-2019-0708.recommended_action: Restringir RDP, validar exposicao de rede e aplicar patch imediatamente.
CVE-2019-0708.decision_reason: RCE remoto associado a RDP e alto risco quando exposto.

CVE-2023-23397.name: Outlook privilege escalation / credential exposure
CVE-2023-23397.recommended_action: Aplicar patch, revisar clientes Outlook e procurar autenticacoes NTLM suspeitas.
CVE-2023-23397.decision_reason: CVE com impacto em credenciais e possibilidade de exploracao por vetor de mensagem/calendario.

CVE-2023-34362.name: MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection/RCE chain
CVE-2023-34362.recommended_action: Isolar servico exposto, aplicar patch e revisar possivel exfiltracao.
CVE-2023-34362.decision_reason: CVE associado a servico exposto e risco de vazamento de dados.

keyword_rules.name: Remote Code Execution
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Validar se o servico afetado esta exposto. Se estiver exposto, restringir acesso e aplicar patch urgente.

keyword_rules.name: Authentication Bypass
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Restringir acesso ao servico vulneravel, aplicar patch e revisar logs de acesso.

keyword_rules.name: Privilege Escalation
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Aplicar patch e revisar usuarios com permissao local no host afetado.

keyword_rules.name: Exchange exposed service
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Validar exposicao externa do Exchange, aplicar patch e revisar logs IIS/Exchange.

keyword_rules.name: RDP/SMB Windows exposure
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Validar exposicao de RDP/SMB, restringir acesso de rede e aplicar patch.

keyword_rules.name: Public web application/service
keyword_rules.recommended_action: Validar se a aplicacao esta exposta, revisar WAF/proxy e aplicar patch.

isolate_or_restrict_service.label: Isolar ou restringir servico
isolate_or_restrict_service.description: Restringe acesso ao servico vulneravel e orienta isolamento quando o risco for critico.

patch_urgent.label: Aplicar patch urgente
patch_urgent.description: Prioriza patch no Endpoint Central ou ferramenta equivalente.

patch_priority.label: Priorizar patch
patch_priority.description: Inclui host em fila prioritaria de correcao.

restrict_rdp_and_patch.label: Restringir RDP e aplicar patch
restrict_rdp_and_patch.description: Recomenda bloqueio/restricao de RDP antes de patch.

domain_controller_containment.label: Contencao em Domain Controller
domain_controller_containment.description: Fluxo especial para ativos de dominio.
